title: ServiceNow Configuration Item
description: A ServiceNow CMDB configuration item record representing a hardware, software, or service component tracked in the Configuration Management Database.

sys_id.description: The unique 32-character system identifier for the configuration item.

name.description: The display name of the configuration item.

sys_class_name.description: The CMDB class name identifying the type of CI, such as cmdb_ci_server, cmdb_ci_appl, or cmdb_ci_service.

category.description: The category of the configuration item.

subcategory.description: The subcategory of the configuration item.

short_description.description: A brief description of the configuration item.

operational_status.description: The operational status: 1=Operational, 2=Non-Operational, 3=Repair in Progress, 4=DR Standby, 5=Ready, 6=Retired.

install_status.description: The install status: 1=Installed, 2=In Maintenance, 3=Pending Install, 4=Pending Repair, 5=In Stock, 6=Retired, 7=Stolen, 8=Absent, 100=On Order.

serial_number.description: The serial number of the hardware asset.

ip_address.description: The IP address of the CI.

mac_address.description: The MAC address of the CI.

dns_domain.description: The DNS domain of the CI.

os.description: The operating system installed on the CI.

os_version.description: The version of the operating system.

ram.description: The amount of RAM in MB.

disk_space.description: The total disk space in GB.

location.description: The physical location of the CI.

department.description: The department that owns the CI.

company.description: The company that owns the CI.

assigned_to.description: The user assigned to the CI.

owned_by.description: The user who owns the CI.

support_group.description: The group responsible for supporting the CI.

supported_by.description: The user providing primary support for the CI.

discovery_source.description: The source that discovered or populated this CI.

first_discovered.description: When the CI was first discovered.

last_discovered.description: When the CI was last discovered.

sys_created_on.description: The date and time the record was created.

sys_created_by.description: The user who created the record.

sys_updated_on.description: The date and time the record was last updated.

sys_updated_by.description: The user who last updated the record.

sys_mod_count.description: The number of times the record has been modified.

ReferenceField.description: A ServiceNow reference field that can be a sys_id string or an object containing a link and value.

link.description: The API URL to the referenced record.

value.description: The sys_id of the referenced record.

display_value.description: The display value of the referenced record.
